creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hello, 

Thanks for the notification, but I cannot fetch it: 

=> STIXv1.0.0.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/. 
=> Attempting to fetch from 
http://www.mozilla.org/projects/mathml/fonts/stix/. 
fetch: http://www.mozilla.org/projects/mathml/fonts/stix/STIXv1.0.0.zip: 
Not Found 
=> Attempting to fetch from 
ftp://ftp.fr.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/. 
fetch: 
ftp://ftp.fr.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/STIXv1.0.0.zip: 
File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access) 
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this 
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again. 
*** Error code 1 

On the page 
<https://developer.mozilla.org/en/Mozilla_MathML_Project/Fonts> 
a copy the Beta pack is still available, but not yet version 1.0.0. 

There is only a pointer to the STIX site at 
<http://www.aip.org/stixfonts/font_download.jsp> 
but it's not possible to download it without agreeing to the license, 
and thus it cannot be automatically fetchable. 

Have you found this package on some mirror? 

Best regards, 
--  
Th. Thomas
